name: 旅游场景
desc: 基于 Oxford 3000 高频词表筛选 + 旅游专项短语，共 558 词，覆盖机场、酒店、餐厅、问路、购物等场景

words.chinese: 门, 牌楼, 大门, 通道, 闸\nvt. 装门于\n[计] 门
路径, 小路, 道路, 途径, 路线, 轨道\n[计] 路径
方向, 指导, 趋势\n[计] 方向
出口, 退场, 离去, 去世\nvi. 退出, 脱离, 去世\n[计] 退出

符号, 招牌, 征兆, 正负号, 手势
vt. 签名, 打手势表达
vi. 签名
[计] 正负号
岛, 岛屿, 孤立地
地方性的, 当地的, 局部的, 乡土的, 本地的\nn. 当地居民, 本地新闻, 局部\n[计] 本地的

商店, 贮藏, 仓库, 备用品, 存储器
vt. 储存, 贮藏, 供给
vi. 贮藏
a. 贮藏的, 现成的
[计] 存储器操作
交换, (电话)交换局, 交换机, 汇兑, 交易所\nv. 交换, 交易, 兑换\n[计] 交换
意外事件, 机遇, 事故, 次要方面\n[化] 意外事故
出售, 卖, 拍卖, 销售额, 廉价出售\n[经] 卖, 出售

陆地, 地面, 地界, 地产, 国土, 土地
vi. 登陆, 登岸, 到达
vt. 使上岸, 使登陆, 使到达
[计] 连接盘
诉苦, 抱怨, 控诉\n[医] 陈诉
交通工具, 车辆, 传播媒介\n[化] 载体

周期, 循环, 自行车, 一段时间, 整套
vi. 循环, 轮转, 骑自行车
vt. 使循环, 使轮转
[计] 环路
糖, 糖块, 甜言蜜
膳宿, 预订铺位, 适应性调节, 调和, 贷款\n[医] 调节(眼)
自然, 大自然, 本性, 性格, 性质\n[医] 自然, 大自然

帮忙, 帮助者, 补救办法, 有益的东西
vt. 帮助, 帮忙, 接济, 治疗, 款待
vi. 有用, 救命, 招待
[计] 帮助, 帮助程序
油, 石油, 油画颜
床, 睡眠处, 河床

words.example: Please show your boarding pass at the gate.
words.example_cn: 请在登机口出示您的登机牌。

words.example: Carry-on baggage must fit in the overhead bin.
words.example_cn: 随身行李必须能放入头顶行李架。

words.example: There is a fee for checked baggage over 23kg.
words.example_cn: 超过23公斤的托运行李需要收费。

words.example: Please proceed to baggage claim area 3.
words.example_cn: 请前往第三号行李认领处。

words.example: You can buy perfume at the duty-free shop.
words.example_cn: 你可以在免税店购买香水。

words.example: My connecting flight departs in two hours.
words.example_cn: 我的转机航班两小时后起飞。

words.example: I prefer a window seat on long flights.
words.example_cn: 长途飞行我更喜欢靠窗座位。

words.example: Can I have an aisle seat, please?
words.example_cn: 请问我可以要靠过道的座位吗？

words.example: Please place your bag in the overhead bin.
words.example_cn: 请将您的包放入头顶行李架。

words.example: Please remove your shoes for the security check.
words.example_cn: 安全检查时请脱下鞋子。

words.example: The baggage allowance is 20 kilograms.
What is your flight number?
Please wait in the departure lounge.
Please fill in the entry card before landing.
words.example_cn: 请在降落前填写入境卡。

words.example: I'm suffering from jet lag after my long flight.
words.example_cn: 长途飞行后我有时差反应。

words.example: Do I need a transit visa for this stopover?
words.example_cn: 这次中转我需要过境签证吗？

words.example: Please complete the customs declaration form.
Boarding time is 30 minutes before departure.
words.example_cn: 登机时间在起飞前30分钟。

words.example: You have to pay for excess baggage.
words.example_cn: 您需要为超重行李付费。

words.example: Please queue at passport control.
I'd like to book a round trip ticket.
words.example_cn: 我想预订一张往返机票。

words.example: Is this a one-way ticket or round trip?
words.example_cn: 这是单程票还是往返票？

words.example: Only one piece of hand luggage is allowed.
words.example_cn: 只允许携带一件手提行李。

words.example: Is there a direct flight to Paris?
We have a three-hour layover in Dubai.
words.example_cn: 我们在迪拜有三小时中转停留。

words.example: Check-in time is 3 PM.
Check-out time is 12 noon.
I'd like to order room service, please.
Please ask at the front desk.
I need a single room for two nights.
words.example_cn: 我需要一间单人房住两晚。

words.example: A double room with a sea view, please.
words.example_cn: 请给我一间海景双人大床房。

words.example: We'd like a twin room with two single beds.
words.example_cn: 我们想要一间有两张单人床的双床房。

words.example: The presidential suite on the top floor.
Here is your keycard for room 302.
Can I request a late checkout?
words.example_cn: 我可以申请延迟退房吗？

words.example: Please hang the do not disturb sign on the door.
words.example_cn: 请把请勿打扰的牌子挂在门上。

words.example: Drinks from the minibar will be charged.
words.example_cn: 迷你吧里的饮品需要收费。

words.example: Complimentary breakfast is served from 7 to 10.
words.example_cn: 免费早餐供应时间是7点到10点。

words.example: Can housekeeping clean my room now?
words.example_cn: 客房服务现在可以打扫我的房间吗？

words.example: Can I have a wake-up call at 7 AM?
words.example_cn: 我可以安排早上7点的叫醒服务吗？

words.example: I'd like to use the safe deposit box.
Does the hotel offer laundry service?
The room rate includes continental breakfast.
How do I adjust the air conditioning?
Could you upgrade my room, please?
words.example_cn: 请问可以帮我升级房间吗？

words.example: I'd like a non-smoking room on a high floor.
words.example_cn: 我想要高楼层的禁烟房。

words.example: Where is the fitness center?
Please ask the concierge for restaurant recommendations.
words.example_cn: 请向礼宾员询问餐厅推荐。

words.example: The bellhop will bring your luggage up.
words.example_cn: 行李员会把您的行李送上来。

words.example: Does the hotel offer valet parking?
words.example_cn: 酒店提供代客泊车服务吗？

words.example: I'll have the set menu for lunch.
Would you like to order à la carte?
What is today's daily special?
words.example_cn: 今天的每日特供是什么？

words.example: What is the house specialty?
I'd like the soup as an appetizer.
What do you recommend for the main course?
Can I substitute the side dish?
May I see the wine list, please?
Still or sparkling water?
I'll have still water, thank you.
I have some dietary restrictions.
I have a nut food allergy.
Do you have any vegetarian options?
I'd like my steak well done.
I prefer my steak medium rare.
Can I get this to go, please?
Can we split the bill?
Is the service charge included?
A table for two, please.
words.example_cn: 请给我安排一张两人桌。

words.example: How long is the waiting list?
Can I have a doggy bag for the leftovers?
words.example_cn: 剩下的菜可以帮我打包吗？

words.example: This is an all-you-can-eat buffet.
Can I have tap water please?
words.example_cn: 请给我一杯自来水好吗？

words.example: I love fresh seafood by the beach.
words.example_cn: 我喜欢海边的新鲜海鲜。

words.example: Do you have any gluten-free options?
words.example_cn: 你们有无麸质的选项吗？

words.example: Excuse me, how do I get to the station?
words.example_cn: 打扰一下，请问怎么去车站？

Turn right at the next corner.
Go straight for two blocks.
Wait until the traffic light turns green.

The bus stop is just around the corner.
Is there a subway station nearby?
The hotel is within walking distance.
Let me check the GPS navigation.
Take the second exit at the roundabout.

words.example: How far is it to the city center?
Can we get there on foot?
words.example_cn: 我们可以步行到那里吗？

words.example: Which local bus goes to the old town?
words.example_cn: 哪路本地公交去老城区？

words.example: How far is it from here?
The shopping mall is open until 10 PM.
words.example_cn: 购物中心营业到晚上10点。

words.example: There's a big department store downtown.
words.example_cn: 市中心有一家大型百货公司。

words.example: Where is the fitting room?
Everything in this store is on sale.
words.example_cn: 这家店所有商品都在打折。

words.example: The price tag says 50 dollars.
Can I get a tax refund here?
How do I claim a VAT refund?
Please pay at the cash register.
Do you accept contactless payment?

words.example: What is the current exchange rate?
Where is the currency exchange counter?
Do you accept credit cards?
I'm sorry, this item is out of stock.
words.example_cn: 很抱歉，这件商品缺货了。

words.example: I'll buy some souvenirs at the gift shop.
words.example_cn: 我在礼品店买些纪念品。

words.example: What is your return policy?
words.example_cn: 你们的退货政策是什么？

words.example: I need to call the police.
Please take me to the emergency room.
Is there a first aid kit nearby?
I have travel insurance for medical emergencies.
words.example_cn: 我有旅行保险可以应对医疗紧急情况。

words.example: I've lost my passport.
My wallet has been stolen.
Where is the nearest hospital?
I need my allergy medication.
I need to contact my country's embassy.
words.example_cn: 我需要联系我国大使馆。

words.example: I need to file a police report.
The doctor asked about my medical history.
My blood type is O positive.
Do you have any pain killers?
I need a prescription for this medicine.
words.example_cn: 我需要一张处方购买这种药。

words.example: Please call my emergency contact.
words.example_cn: 请联系我的紧急联系人。

words.example: One one-way ticket to the city center, please.
words.example_cn: 请给我一张去市中心的单程票。

words.example: I'd like a return ticket to the airport.
words.example_cn: 我想要一张去机场的往返票。

words.example: You can use a transit card on all buses.
words.example_cn: 所有公交都可以使用交通卡。

words.example: Avoid traveling during rush hour.
Where is the car rental counter?
The rental car includes a GPS device.
There is a toll on this road.
Is there a parking lot nearby?
The high-speed rail is the fastest option.
Is there a left luggage office at the station?
Let me check the timetable.
Which platform number is this train?
The ferry departs from the harbor.
Let's use a rideshare app to get there.
words.example_cn: 我们用网约车APP去那里吧。

words.example: Is there a bike rental service nearby?
words.example_cn: 附近有自行车租赁服务吗？

words.example: The Eiffel Tower is a famous tourist attraction.
words.example_cn: 埃菲尔铁塔是著名的旅游景点。

words.example: I'd like to join a guided tour.
words.example_cn: 我想参加导游带队的游览。

words.example: An audio guide is available at the entrance.
words.example_cn: 入口处有语音导览可用。

words.example: What are the opening hours of the museum?
words.example_cn: 博物馆的开放时间是什么？

words.example: What is the entrance fee?
This spot offers a great photo opportunity.
words.example_cn: 这个地方是很好的拍照机会。

words.example: I want to try the local cuisine.
This is a unique cultural experience.
words.example_cn: 这是一次独特的文化体验。

words.example: We visited several historical sites today.
words.example_cn: 今天我们参观了几处历史遗址。

words.example: This is one of the most popular scenic spots.
words.example_cn: 这是最受欢迎的风景区之一。

words.example: Yellowstone is a famous national park.
words.example_cn: 黄石是著名的国家公园。

words.example: I love trying street food when I travel.
words.example_cn: 旅行时我喜欢尝试街头小吃。

words.example: The night market opens after 6 PM.
The sunset view here is spectacular.
words.example_cn: 这里的日落景色非常壮观。

words.example: The hiking trail starts near the park entrance.
words.example_cn: 徒步小径从公园入口附近开始。

words.example: The immigration officer checked my passport.
words.example_cn: 移民官检查了我的护照。

words.example: Your boarding gate is B12.
My baggage is overweight by 3 kilograms.
What is the departure time for this flight?
words.example_cn: 这次航班的出发时间是什么？

words.example: The estimated arrival time is 3 PM.
words.example_cn: 预计到达时间是下午3点。

words.example: I need to check in for a domestic flight.
words.example_cn: 我需要为国内航班办理登机手续。

words.example: Gate 5 is for international flights.
Please fasten your seat belt.
Please close the overhead compartment.
Please attach the baggage tag to your suitcase.
words.example_cn: 请将行李标签贴到您的箱子上。

words.example: Please call the flight attendant if you need help.
words.example_cn: 如果需要帮助，请呼叫空乘人员。

words.example: I booked a seat in economy class.
words.example_cn: 我预订了经济舱的座位。

words.example: The business class seats are very comfortable.
words.example_cn: 商务舱的座位非常舒适。

words.example: Would you like the chicken or beef in-flight meal?
words.example_cn: 您想要鸡肉还是牛肉飞机餐？

words.example: Check the departure board for gate information.
words.example_cn: 查看出发信息显示屏了解登机门信息。

words.example: Please meet me at the arrivals hall.
I forgot to pack my travel adapter.
words.example_cn: 我忘记带旅行转接头了。

words.example: We crossed three time zones on this flight.
words.example_cn: 我们这次飞行跨越了三个时区。

words.example: We have a stopover in Singapore.
words.example_cn: 我们在新加坡有一次中途停留。

words.example: Please print your e-ticket or show it on your phone.
words.example_cn: 请打印您的电子机票或在手机上出示。

words.example: Please wait for me in the hotel lobby.
What is your room number?
I'd like an ocean view room if possible.
words.example_cn: 如果可以，我想要一间海景房。

words.example: The swimming pool is open until 10 PM.
The breakfast buffet starts at 7 AM.
words.example_cn: 早餐自助餐从早上7点开始。

words.example: The hotel amenities include a gym and spa.
words.example_cn: 酒店设施包括健身房和水疗中心。

words.example: What is the room rate per night?
Please show your booking confirmation at check-in.
words.example_cn: 请在入住时出示您的预订确认。

words.example: Can I request an extra bed?
Could I have an extra pillow, please?
words.example_cn: 请问可以多给我一个枕头吗？

words.example: I need an extra blanket.
words.example_cn: 我需要一条额外的毯子。

words.example: Can you skip room cleaning today?
words.example_cn: 今天可以不打扫房间吗？

words.example: I'd like to book a treatment at the spa.
words.example_cn: 我想预约水疗中心的护理项目。

words.example: The front desk is available 24 hours.
I'd like to make a noise complaint.

words.example_cn: 我把充电器落在房间里了，有失物招领处吗？

words.example: Does the hotel have a shuttle to the airport?
words.example_cn: 酒店有去机场的班车吗？

words.example: This is an all-you-can-eat buffet restaurant.
words.example_cn: 这是一家可以无限吃的自助餐厅。

words.example: We'd like a fine dining experience tonight.
words.example_cn: 今晚我们想体验一下高档餐饮。

words.example: Do you have outdoor seating?
Can I have a half portion of pasta?

words.example: Free refills are included.
I'd like to try a local specialty.
words.example_cn: 我想尝试一下当地特色菜。

words.example_cn: 三道式套餐包括前菜、主菜和甜点。

Would you like some sparkling wine?

Do you have any non-alcoholic drinks?

Reservation is required for dinner.

words.example_cn: 走廊里有一台自动售货机。

Can I have a straw for this drink?

Can I have a takeaway box for this?

The station is about ten minutes away.

Don't forget to apply sunscreen.

words.example: The coral reef is perfect for snorkeling.
Are you brave enough to try bungee jumping?
words.example_cn: 你够勇敢去尝试蹦极吗？

words.example: Join a whale watching tour this morning.
words.example_cn: 今天早上参加一个观鲸之旅吧。

words.example: The cultural show starts at 8 PM.
The folk dance performance was amazing.
words.example_cn: 民间舞蹈表演非常精彩。

words.example: I signed up for a local cooking class.
words.example_cn: 我报名参加了当地的烹饪课。

words.example: The vineyard offers free wine tasting.
words.example_cn: 这家葡萄酒庄提供免费品酒。

words.example: Join a photography tour at sunrise.
words.example_cn: 在日出时参加摄影之旅。

words.example: I booked a relaxing spa treatment.
words.example_cn: 我预约了一个放松的水疗护理。

words.example: Language exchange helps you practice English.
words.example_cn: 语言交流帮助你练习英语。

words.example: We were lucky to see a local festival.
words.example_cn: 我们很幸运地见到了当地节日。

words.example: The street performance drew a big crowd.
words.example_cn: 街头表演吸引了大批观众。
